texto: Parenting, similar to aging, is not for the faint of heart. It is a sacred journey, filled with learning experiences for both parties, not all of which are easy. This journey requires that we are brave, honest, noble and resilient. Love for our children carries us through this journey and encourages us to feel more, give more, and be more than we ever thought we were capable of.
explicacao: Citação de Jeanmarie Wilson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Parenting, similar to aging, is not for the faint of heart.
